ecoLodgeHero.label: Afari Eco Lodge
ecoLodgeHero.heading: A Retreat Rooted in Wilderness, Stillness, and Story.
ecoLodgeHero.subheading: A future hospitality concept inspired by nature, culture, and immersive safari living.
ecoLodgeHero.imageAlt: Luxury safari lodge deck overlooking wilderness at golden hour

ecoLodgeConcept.label: The Concept
ecoLodgeConcept.statement: Designed as a sanctuary between landscape, architecture, and human connection.
ecoLodgeConcept.body: Afari Eco Lodge is envisioned as a place of slow luxury — where eco-conscious hospitality meets immersive wilderness experience. Built from local materials and shaped by African design, it invites guests to travel with intention: fewer distractions, deeper presence, and a rhythm set by the land. This is not a resort. It is a future chapter in how Afari Trails imagines exploration, rest, and return to what matters.

ecoLodgeExperiences.label: The Experience
ecoLodgeExperiences.heading: What you feel here.
ecoLodgeExperiences.intro: Not amenities — atmosphere. Moments designed to shift pace and perspective.

ecoLodgeDesign.label: Architecture & Design
ecoLodgeDesign.heading: Built to belong to the landscape.
ecoLodgeDesign.body: Natural materials, earthy textures, and open-air architecture allow the lodge to dissolve into its surroundings. Sustainable construction, handcrafted details, and lantern-lit pathways create a sense of arrival — quiet, warm, and deeply considered.

moodboard.alt: Natural wood and linen interior textures
Earthy stone and warm interior light

ecoLodgeSustainability.label: Sustainability
ecoLodgeSustainability.heading: Stewardship woven into every detail.
ecoLodgeSustainability.intro: Elegant responsibility — never preachy, always intentional.

pillars.title: Solar Energy
pillars.description: Renewable power designed for low-impact wilderness operations.

pillars.title: Water Preservation
pillars.description: Thoughtful systems that respect river ecosystems and scarce resources.

pillars.title: Local Sourcing
pillars.description: Materials and craftsmanship drawn from surrounding communities.

pillars.title: Conservation Partnerships
pillars.description: Aligned with projects that protect wildlife and wild places.

pillars.title: Community Collaboration
pillars.description: Employment, training, and cultural exchange built into the model.

pillars.title: Low-Impact Architecture
pillars.description: Structures that touch the land lightly and endure with grace.

ecoLodgeFutureVision.quote: Afari Eco Lodge is envisioned as part of a wider ecosystem of exploration, conservation, and immersive African hospitality experiences.

ecoLodgeLocation.label: Location
ecoLodgeLocation.heading: Zambia. River. Remote horizon.
ecoLodgeLocation.body: Planned within one of Zambia's extraordinary wilderness regions — where river ecosystems, safari landscapes, and vast silence create the perfect canvas for slow, intentional hospitality.

ecoLodgePartnerCta.heading: Join the Vision
ecoLodgePartnerCta.body: We welcome aligned hospitality, conservation, and development partnerships.

ecoLodgeClosing.quote: Luxury is not excess. It is space, silence, and connection.
